text.title: Change Control Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Change agreed in a corridor conversation, work started immediately.
antipattern.root-cause: no CR ID linked to delivered work
antipattern.fix: Refuse work without CR; backlog-fill CR if must.

antipattern.symptom: Baseline document untouched while 12 CRs approved.
antipattern.root-cause: baseline timestamp older than oldest open CR
antipattern.fix: Re-publish baseline after each batch of approvals.

antipattern.symptom: Single PM approves CRs without convening CCB.
antipattern.root-cause: no CCB attendance log per CR
antipattern.fix: Schedule CCB cadence; require quorum log.
